title: Jaques of London Wooden Shape Sorter for 1 Year Old | Montessori Wooden Toys | Toddler Learning Toys | Premium Gifts Since 1795
features: Montessori Toys for Learning: Our wooden shape sorter is an ideal montessori toy for 1 year old. It stimulates cognitive development and enhances shape recognition skills.
Perfect Toys for 1 Year Old: The wooden toys are designed to be safe, durable and engaging for 1 year old boys and girls. Ideal for developing fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.
Thoughtful Gift Idea: These wooden toys for 2 year olds make perfect gifts. They are not only fun but also educational, making them perfect for birthdays or special occasions.
Quality Wooden Baby Toys: Our baby shape sorter is made from high-quality wood, ensuring durability and longevity. It is smooth to touch and safe for your child's little hands.
Educational Montessori Toys: These wooden montessori toys are designed to engage your child in a fun learning experience. They help develop spatial awareness and problem-solving skills.
